messages.content: I need a Python email validator function and a password hasher function

plan.description: Create email_validator.py with basic function structure that accepts a string and returns a boolean. Implement basic format check for single '@' symbol.

interface.name: validate_email_format
interface.description: Validate email format by checking for a single '@' symbol in the string.

plan.description: Extend email validator to split email into local-part and domain, validate both sections for allowed characters, and check domain contains at least one dot.

interface.name: validate_email_parts
interface.description: Split email into local-part and domain, validate allowed characters in both sections, and ensure domain contains at least one dot.

plan.description: Add optional TLD validation feature to check against a list of common top-level domains (com, org, net, etc.).

interface.name: validate_email_with_tld
interface.description: Validate email format with optional TLD validation against a list of common top-level domains (com, org, net, etc.).

plan.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for email validator covering valid emails, invalid formats, multiple @ symbols, invalid characters, and domain/TLD cases.

interface.name: test_email_validator
interface.description: Run comprehensive unit tests for email validator covering valid emails, invalid formats, multiple @ symbols, invalid characters, and domain/TLD cases.

plan.description: Create password_hasher.py with function structure for hashing. Choose bcrypt as algorithm and implement basic hash generation with automatic salt.

interface.name: hash_password
interface.description: Hash a plain text password using bcrypt algorithm with automatic salt generation.

plan.description: Implement separate verification function that compares plain text password with stored hash using bcrypt's verify method.

interface.name: verify_password
interface.description: Verify a plain text password against a stored hash using bcrypt's verify method.

plan.description: Add edge case handling for empty passwords and very long passwords with appropriate error handling or truncation warnings.

interface.name: validate_and_hash_password
interface.description: Hash password with edge case handling for empty passwords and very long passwords with appropriate error handling or truncation warnings.

plan.description: Create unit tests for password hasher covering successful hashing, verification, incorrect password rejection, and edge cases.

interface.name: test_password_hasher
interface.description: Run unit tests for password hasher covering successful hashing, verification, incorrect password rejection, and edge cases.

plan.description: Add documentation in password_hasher.py explaining security considerations, algorithm choice (bcrypt), work factor configuration, and salt generation.

interface.name: get_password_hasher_documentation
interface.description: Generate documentation explaining security considerations, algorithm choice (bcrypt), work factor configuration, and salt generation.

requirements.title: Email Validator Function
requirements.description: Create a Python function that validates email addresses according to standard email format rules and common validation patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Function accepts a string input and returns a boolean indicating validity
Checks for common invalid patterns (multiple @ symbols, invalid characters)
Validates domain has at least one dot after @ symbol
Includes comprehensive unit tests covering valid and invalid cases

requirements.title: Password Hasher Function
requirements.description: Create a Python function that securely hashes passwords using industry-standard cryptographic algorithms.
acceptance_criteria: Function accepts a plain text password string and returns a secure hash
Uses bcrypt, Argon2, or PBKDF2 with appropriate work factors
Includes salt generation for each hash
Provides a separate verification function to compare plain text with hash
Handles edge cases (empty passwords, very long passwords)
Includes unit tests for hashing and verification functionality
Documents security considerations and algorithm choices

progress_text: 当前进度：接口定义已补全，等待确认执行。

pending_approvals.title: Execute plan
pending_approvals.description: Plan is ready. Approve to start execution.
pending_approvals.reason: Plan and interface definitions are complete.
